since_last: 30% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.08%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.19% · BTC -1.85% · Gold -2.07% · Nasdaq100 -1.86%. 30% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.08%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.08%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.34%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -13.94%
cards.body: Leaders: HON +6.29%, SKHY +5.43%, AVAV +5.11%, FIX +3.75%, MU +3.30%. Laggards: TSLA -13.94%, GOOGL -7.24%, CRNC -5.81%, UPST -5.20%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.64% at $111.06
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.64% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
